headline: Hasbro’s Cyberattack and Network Disruption Could Be A Game Changer For Hasbro (HAS)
summary: Hasbro recently disclosed a cyberattack on its internal network that forced partial system shutdowns, triggered an external investigation, and may cause shipment and order delays while containment and remediation efforts continue. While the company reports that key digital platforms like D&D Beyond and Magic: The Gathering Arena remained online, the incident highlights operational and cybersecurity risks that are increasingly material for an IP-driven, omni-channel entertainment...
